description_long: This is a compact, rectangular projector device with a robust, industrial design, primarily constructed from matte black plastic and metal. The body features ribbed and contoured side panels for grip and heat dissipation, with visible screws and a few small, labeled buttons or switches. The front face houses a prominent circular lens, surrounded by a metallic ring and a protective shroud, while the rear displays a flat panel with a warning label. One side is marked with the text 'SBAL-PL' in bold white letters, and there are additional yellow caution labels near the lens area. The device appears to have mounting rails on the top, suggesting it can be attached to other equipment or surfaces. Overall, the object is rugged and utilitarian, suitable for demanding urban environments.
description: A rugged, compact projector with a circular lens, ribbed black body, and visible mounting rails, marked 'SBAL-PL' on the side.
description_view_0: Rear view showing a flat panel with a warning label and the mounting rail on top.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting ribbed grip panels, a small button, and a yellow caution label near the lens.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the prominent circular lens, metallic ring, and protective shroud.
description_view_3: Right side view with 'SBAL-PL' marking, ribbed grip, and visible screws.
attribute_brand_logo: The object is marked with 'SBAL-PL' in bold white letters on the right side panel, but no distinct brand logo is visible.
attribute_lens_type: Fixed lens; circular, medium-sized, with a metallic ring and protective shroud.
attribute_control_panel_design: A small control area with a button and switch is visible on the side, with minimal labeling and no complex interface.
attribute_ventilation_pattern: Ribbed side panels likely serve as heat dissipation fins, but no explicit vents or grills are visible.
